news_context_text:
【NVIDIA NVDA Latest Intel】
1. Blackwell GPU architecture shipping at record pace; hyperscalers (Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Meta) all ramping orders for 2025.
2. Data Center revenue $35.6B in Q4 FY2025, +93% YoY; gross margin 73.5% above guidance.
3. Sovereign AI demand strong from Middle East, Japan, and Europe government programs.
4. Risks: US export controls tightening on H20/B20 chips to China; AMD MI300X gaining data center traction; valuation premium requires continued execution.

latest_news.summary: Blackwell ramp strong; Data Center +93% YoY; sovereign AI orders expanding

risk_check.summary: China export controls; AMD competition; premium valuation execution risk

earnings_preview.summary: Q1 FY2026 guide $43B revenue; gross margin 70.6% midpoint; Blackwell demand exceeds supply
